CREATE TABLE test_map (id INT, key_value_map MAP<INT, INT>);
SELECT map_entries(key_value_map) FROM test_map WHERE id = 1;
SELECT map_entries(key_value_map) as entries FROM test_map WHERE id = 2;
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, value INT);
SELECT t.id, map_entries(t.key_value_map) FROM test_map t JOIN another_table a ON t.id = a.ref_id;
SELECT a.ref_id, t.id, map_entries(t.key_value_map) FROM test_map t LEFT JOIN another_table a ON t.id = a.ref_id;
SELECT t.id, map_entries(map([100, 200], [10, 20])) FROM test_map t WHERE t.id = 1;
SELECT t.id, map_entries(map([key, value])) FROM (SELECT 1 AS key, 100 AS value) AS temp JOIN test_map t ON t.id = 1;
